chapter_title: Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight
text:

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 621. Gen. Provisions Relating to Vehicle Size & Weight
##### § 621.509 — Failure to Maintain Weight Record

(a) A person commits an offense if the person fails to keep a weight record in violation of Section 621.410 (Weight Record) .

(b) An offense under this section is a Class C misdemeanor.

*Added by Acts 2001, 77th Leg., ch. 1227, Sec. 7, eff. Oct. 1, 2001.*
